algorithm.evidence_payload: line starts, normalized-window SHA-256, and token count; no upstream text
algorithm.exact_match: SHA-256 equality of complete raw payload bytes
algorithm.history_scope: each unique Git blob reachable from the frozen commit, including all ancestors; no size or path exclusion
algorithm.line_normalization: Unicode NFC, strip leading/trailing Unicode whitespace, then collapse each Unicode whitespace run to one ASCII space
algorithm.pair_count: one per unique pair identity with at least one matching window
algorithm.pair_identity: canonical target relative path + upstream repository name + Git blob OID
algorithm.target_scope: every regular file recursively present in the canonical Skill root; symlinks, non-UTF-8, or NUL-bearing target files fail the audit
algorithm.text_blob_eligibility: strict UTF-8 decode succeeds and raw payload contains no NUL byte
algorithm.token20_candidate: a normalized-window pair with at least one matching window containing 20 or more ASCII [A-Za-z0-9]+ tokens; this is a review candidate, not a legal conclusion
algorithm.window: four physically contiguous normalized lines, all four non-empty
